requirement: Use train months 2026-01 through 2026-06 only for selecting among precommitted families; test months 2026-07 through 2026-12 are untouched until final evaluation.
pass_threshold: No thresholds may be changed after Phase86.

requirement: A candidate must have positive after-cost net P&L and precision_cost_clear >= 0.55 on both train and test.
A candidate must trade at least 1000 bars in train and 1000 bars in test, with at least 20 symbols represented.
At least 4/6 test months must be after-cost positive, and no single month may contribute more than 50% of total test net P&L.
Cost drag divided by absolute gross P&L must be <= 0.60 on test.
If no precommitted family passes, retire this composite family class rather than widening thresholds in the same run.
